creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to nix23 from comment #10)

The driver is currently not compiling; it needs changes to LinuxKPI related to "struct page".  If anyone wants to work on these I have a start of it in progress but until that is fully sorted (as it'll also affect drm and other consumers) the driver won't be connected to the build or be ready for testing.
